treatments.heroDesc: Discover world-class dental care in Istanbul. From cosmetic dentistry to full-mouth rehabilitation, our specialist dentists deliver exceptional results with advanced technology and personalized treatment planning. (AR)

treatments.collectionDesc: Each dental treatment at FeRa Clinic is carefully planned to deliver exceptional results with minimal discomfort and maximum precision. Treatment plans are personalized based on individual clinical evaluation. (AR)
treatments.ctaDesc: Contact our Istanbul clinic today for a complimentary consultation and personalized treatment plan. Our specialist dentists are ready to help you achieve your dental health goals. (AR)

implants.title: Dental Implants Istanbul (AR)
implants.desc: The gold standard for permanent tooth replacement. Our surgical specialists utilize Swiss-engineered titanium implants and 3D computer-guided protocols to restore full biological function and natural aesthetics with a lifetime clinical warranty. (AR)

seo.title: Dental Implants Istanbul | Implant Treatment Turkey | Permanent Tooth Replacement (AR)
seo.description: Premium dental implants in Istanbul, Turkey. Swiss-engineered titanium implants with 3D guided surgery. Permanent tooth replacement with lifetime warranty. Specialist oral surgeons. (AR)

implants.heroDesc: Experience the pinnacle of implant dentistry at FeRa Clinic. Our board-certified oral surgeons combine Swiss precision engineering with advanced 3D surgical planning to deliver permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that restore both function and confidence. (AR)
implants.benefitsOverview: Why choose dental implants at FeRa Clinic? Our implant protocols represent the fusion of biological science and surgical precision, offering a permanent solution that looks, feels, and functions like your natural teeth. (AR)

hollywood.title: Hollywood Smile Istanbul (AR)
hollywood.desc: A comprehensive smile transformation using ultra-thin E-Max porcelain veneers. Our master ceramists craft each veneer to enhance your facial symmetry and create a radiant, natural-looking smile that reflects your personality. (AR)

seo.title: Hollywood Smile Istanbul | Smile Makeover Turkey | Porcelain Veneers (AR)
seo.description: Premium Hollywood Smile makeovers in Istanbul, Turkey. Custom E-Max porcelain veneers with Digital Smile Design. Natural-looking smile transformations with master ceramists. (AR)

hollywood.heroDesc: Experience the art of smile design at FeRa Clinic. Our master ceramists combine advanced Digital Smile Design with hand-crafted E-Max porcelain veneers to create a smile that enhances your natural beauty and confidence. (AR)
hollywood.benefitsOverview: Why choose a Hollywood Smile at FeRa Clinic? Our approach combines artistic excellence with dental science to create smile transformations that look completely natural while delivering lasting aesthetic results. (AR)

benefits.4: Minimal biological impact on natural teeth (AR)

beforeAfter.title: Natural Smile Transformation (AR)
beforeAfter.description: Our smile makeovers focus on enhancing your natural beauty rather than creating artificial results. Each transformation is designed to complement your facial features and personality. (AR)
beforeAfter.note: Results vary based on individual clinical evaluation and personal aesthetic goals. Treatment planning includes comprehensive assessment of dental health and facial structure. (AR)

ortho.title: Orthodontics Istanbul (AR)
ortho.desc: Advanced teeth straightening solutions for a perfectly aligned, healthy bite. Our specialist orthodontists use modern clear aligners and precise digital planning to create beautiful, functional smiles with predictable results. (AR)

seo.title: Orthodontics Istanbul | Braces Turkey | Clear Aligners | Teeth Straightening (AR)
seo.description: Expert orthodontic treatment in Istanbul, Turkey. Clear aligners and modern braces for teeth straightening. Specialist orthodontists with digital planning for predictable results. (AR)

ortho.heroDesc: Experience advanced orthodontic care at FeRa Clinic. Our specialist orthodontists combine digital treatment planning with modern clear aligner technology to create perfectly aligned smiles that enhance both function and aesthetics. (AR)

whatIsIt.title: What is Orthodontics? (AR)
whatIsIt.description: Orthodontics is a specialized branch of dentistry focused on correcting teeth and jaw alignment. Using modern clear aligners and precise digital planning, we gradually move teeth into their ideal positions for a healthy, functional bite and beautiful smile. (AR)

candidates.5: Desire for a straighter, more confident smile (AR)
